quran_refs.arabic: ‏فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا ‎
quran_refs.pickthall: Therefore withdraw (O Muhammad <TT>PBUH</TT>) from him who turns away from Our Reminder (this Quran) and desires nothing but the life of this world.
quran_refs.asad: Avoid thou, therefore, those who turn away from all remembrance of Us and care for no more than the life of this world,
quran_refs.phonetic: FaaAArid AAan man tawalla AAan thikrina walam yurid illa alhayata alddunya

doctrine_topics.name: مالک اشتر کے نام خط
doctrine_topics.binder: علی ابن ابی طالب علیہ السلام

hadith_note: KQUR Ahadees are Ismaili tradition — not matched to Ghazali's Sunni Prophetic narrations.  Tradition filter correctly withholds injection.
